text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: "#TrainingNow #SoooHot #BabySoftSunblock #HereIGo"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Done and done. I wonder if Big Bro is already there waiting for me?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Done and done. I wonder if Big Sis is already there waiting for me?

text_block_list.name: Senior Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: My, my. So this is where you've been, Curren.

text_block_list.name: Senior Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: I don't suppose you have a minute? We would love to have a little... "talk" with you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...It's well past time for training, but Curren still hasn't showed up. I
checked her Umasta, but her last update was an hour ago.

text_block_list.name: Curren's Classmate
text_block_list.text: Huh? Curren hasn't shown up to training? Oh no, what if it was them?

text_block_list.name: Curren's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
...Actually, a pair of seniors came by earlier looking for her. And um,
they looked sort of threatening...

text_block_list.name: Curren's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
I was worried, so I asked Curren if she needed me to tag along, but
she said she'd be fine. I didn't know what else to say, so I watched
the three of them leave—

text_block_list.name: Curren's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer?! She's probably behind the school building! Please hurry,
okay?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I dash out to the rear of the school building... only to find Curren
surrounded by a group of upperclassmen!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, Big Bro! What're you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, Big Sis! What're you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ah! Don't tell me I'm late for training?! Aw, I'm so sowwy.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Can you please forgive me? Sniff, sniff.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, you mean my seniors? We've already finished our "talk," so everything's all good!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Right, everyone? ♪

text_block_list.name: Upperclassmen
text_block_list.text: Cute Curren Chan!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm so happy I got to know you guys better! Make sure you
keep on supporting me, okay? ☆

text_block_list.name: Upperclassmen
text_block_list.text: Cute Curren Chan!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Mhm, that's a great answer! ♪ Don't forget to follow me on Umasta,
too! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: See you next time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'll go get changed real quick. You head to the track first, Big Bro!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'll go get changed real quick. You head to the track first, Big Sis!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? It's not like it was a big deal, you know?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I guess my seniors didn't have the best impression of me. So... I just had a talk with them and showed them a bit of my cuteness! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yep. They'd gotten the wrong idea of me, so we had a little chat. And
then, they all fell head over heels in love with me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm still extremely curious about the exact contents of this mysterious
"talk," but I suppose some things are better left unknown. More
importantly...
choice_data_list: I wish you hadn't gone alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although nothing happened this time, it very well could have ended
badly for Curren. That's why I want her to know she can rely on others.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you don't have to worry. Actually, I'm used to this kind of
thing. Cute girls like me end up standing out.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Also, I'd hate to get someone else mixed up in anything nasty, you
know? Whereas if it's just me, I know I can work something out for
sure! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Big Bro. There was a problem, and I used my cuteness to solve it.
I'm glad you're worried for me, but isn't there something else you
could say right now?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Big Sis. There was a problem, and I used my cuteness to solve it. I'm
glad you're worried for me, but isn't there something else you could
say right now?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Like, there's only one thing I want to hear right now. You of all
people should know what I mean, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Like, there's only one thing I want to hear right now. You of all
people should know what I mean, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Of course I am! ♪ And that's the end of that conversation! I'll go get
ready for training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Curren had me wrapped around her little finger again. I thought I
had learned more about her, but it looks like my journey has only just
begun.
